'''Katarra''' was a female [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiee]] who was the daughter of [[Tarkazza]] and helped lead the anti-[[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Kashyyyk resistance/Legends|resistance]] on [[Kashyyyk/Legends|Kashyyyk]]. She met with [[Bria Tharen]], who was also active in the resistance on [[Corellia/Legends|Corellia]].

{{Char-stub}}
